name: hwm_anchored_stop_rises_with_hwm
description: AC-3 (H-1): when the high-water mark rises and the vol-scaled distance is constant, the resolved stop_trigger_level rises with it. Confirms the stop tracks HWM upward as a true trailing stop should.
derivation: Both ticks: symphony_vol=1.0 -> threshold=0.8. current_return on both ticks (0.5) < 0.8 so no lock; stop = base_stop_level. Distance is held constant at 1.0. Tick 1: base = HWM(2.0) - 1.0 = 1.0. Tick 2: HWM advanced to 3.5, base = HWM(3.5) - 1.0 = 2.5. Expected: stop rises 1.0 -> 2.5 (a +1.5 rise exactly matching the +1.5 HWM rise). The stop tracks the HWM 1:1 when distance is constant.
invariant: stop_trigger_level[tick2] > stop_trigger_level[tick1]; stop rises 1:1 with HWM when distance is constant
